---
title: "drug_range"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false 
library(dplyr)
library(stringr) 
library(RobustRankAggreg)
```

```{r}
diamond_path <- 'C:/projects/o2t-tools/data/drug_prioritization/drug_prioritization/drugstone/phenotype_comparison.string.human_links_v12_0_min900.Ensembl.diamond.trustrank.csv'
domino_path <- 'C:/projects/o2t-tools/data/drug_prioritization/drug_prioritization/drugstone/phenotype_comparison.string.human_links_v12_0_min900.Ensembl.domino.trustrank.csv'
```

```{r}
diamond <- read.csv(diamond_path)
domino  <- read.csv(domino_path)

safe_max <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

combined <- full_join(diamond, domino, by = "drugId", suffix = c("_diamond", "_domino")) %>% 
  group_by(drugId) %>%
  summarise(
    X = coalesce(first(X_diamond), first(X_domino)),
    score_diamond = safe_max(score_diamond),
    score_domino  = safe_max(score_domino),
    status = coalesce(first(status_diamond), first(status_domino)),
    hasEdgesTo_diamond = first(hasEdgesTo_diamond),
    hasEdgesTo_domino  = first(hasEdgesTo_domino),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    score_mean = rowMeans(cbind(score_diamond, score_domino), na.rm = TRUE),
    score_max  = pmax(score_diamond, score_domino, na.rm = TRUE),
    score_geom = sqrt(score_diamond * score_domino),
    n_methods = (!is.na(score_diamond)) + (!is.na(score_domino))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    rank_diamond = rank(-score_diamond, na.last = "keep", ties.method = "average"),
    rank_domino  = rank(-score_domino,  na.last = "keep", ties.method = "average")
  )

max_rank <- max(c(combined$rank_diamond, combined$rank_domino), na.rm = TRUE)

combined <- combined %>%
  mutate(
    rank_diamond = ifelse(is.na(rank_diamond), max_rank + 1, rank_diamond),
    rank_domino  = ifelse(is.na(rank_domino),  max_rank + 1, rank_domino),
    mean_rank = rowMeans(cbind(rank_diamond, rank_domino)),
    median_rank = apply(cbind(rank_diamond, rank_domino), 1, median),
    borda_score = (max_rank - rank_diamond + 1) +
                  (max_rank - rank_domino + 1)
  )

rank_lists <- list(
  diamond = combined %>% arrange(rank_diamond) %>% pull(X),
  domino  = combined %>% arrange(rank_domino)  %>% pull(X)
)

rra <- aggregateRanks(rank_lists)

combined <- combined %>%
  left_join(rra, by = c("X" = "Name")) %>%
  rename(rra_score = Score) %>%
  mutate(
    consensus_score =
      as.numeric(scale(borda_score)) +
      as.numeric(scale(n_methods)) -
      as.numeric(scale(mean_rank))
  )

final_ranking <- combined %>%
  arrange(desc(consensus_score))
```
